_publications._publicationTitle: A high-throughput kinome screen reveals serum/glucocorticoid-regulated kinase 1 as a therapeutic target for NF2-deficient meningiomas.

_contextSnippet: SGK1 and PAK1 were each identified by 2 independent shRNA clones in triplicate with robust z scores of −2.47 and −2.28, respectively
details: Robust z score of -2.28 for 2 independent shRNA clones in high-throughput screen, representing >50% reduction in pS6 staining intensity
